name: StrideDiffusion: Accelerating Diffusion Models for Time-series Generation
summary: arXiv:2607.20545v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion models have become competitive generators for time series, but their practical use is limited by the large number of sequential denoising s...
description: arXiv:2607.20545v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion models have become competitive generators for time series, but their practical use is limited by the large number of sequential denoising steps required at inference time. Existing fast samplers typically use fixed or generic timestep schedules, overlooking a distinctive property of time-series diffusion: different spectral bands evolve...
author: Du Yin, Estrid He, Juli\'an Jer\'onimo Ba\~nuelos, Yang Yang, Feng Hu, Yuchen Luo, Hao Xue, Stephan Sigg, Flora Salim
